name: Puducherry
landmark: White Town and the Promenade Beach seafront
stopoverNote: Chennai airport is the most reliable gateway, with East Coast Road taxis/buses taking about 3.5–4.5 hours to Pondicherry; Puducherry airport has limited domestic flights and the rail station is useful but less frequent. The UT has four enclaves — Puducherry, Karaikal, Mahe and Yanam — but a short leisure trip should stay around Pondicherry town, Auroville and Chunnambar rather than attempting distant enclaves.

diet.vegetarian: Vegetarian travel is excellent: South Indian tiffin, meals, idli, dosa, pongal, lemon rice, filter coffee, Franco-Tamil café plates, bakery snacks and Auroville organic cafés are easy around White Town, Mission Street and Auroville. Many cafés can do eggless bakes or veg mains, but seafood restaurants dominate some beach stretches.
diet.vegan: Vegan travel is unusually manageable for India in Auroville and White Town, where organic and plant-forward cafés are common. Still ask clearly about ghee, butter, curd, cream, cheese and paneer in South Indian meals, pastries and café sauces; request oil-only dosas, coconut chutney without curd, rice dishes and vegan thalis.
phrases: Nei, paal, thayir, paneer vendam = no ghee, milk, curd or paneer
Enakku saiva saapadu venum = I want vegetarian food
Sans beurre, sans lait, s'il vous plaît = without butter or milk, please

cities.name: White Town & Promenade
cities.notes: The walkable French Quarter core — heritage lanes, cafés, churches, museums, the Ashram and the car-free evening Promenade/Rock Beach cluster within short walks or autos.

cities.name: Auroville
cities.notes: A separate half/full-day spiritual-design township north of town; Matrimandir viewing and inner-chamber visits require advance visitor booking rather than a casual walk-in plan.

cities.name: Chunnambar & Beach Belt
cities.notes: The easy leisure loop south and north of town — Chunnambar backwater boats to Paradise Beach, plus Serenity and Auroville beaches for sunrise, surf schools and slower café time.

itinerary.sim: Jio and Airtel coverage is strong in Pondicherry town, Auroville and the beach belt; buy/activate before arrival if coming from Chennai. Download offline maps because Auroville's internal lanes and beach approaches can be confusing after dark.

White Town & Promenade.name: White Town & Promenade
White Town & Promenade.note: Two days lets you keep the French Quarter on foot, separate the Ashram/museum/church cluster from the café-and-seafront rhythm, and avoid sightseeing during the hottest afternoon hours.

days.theme: French Quarter heritage, Ashram calm & cafés
days.note: Keep this day walkable: start early in White Town, pause indoors over lunch, then return to the promenade after the heat drops. Sri Aurobindo Ashram requires silence, modest dress and no photography around the Samadhi.

activities.name: White Town heritage walk on Rue Dumas, Rue Romain Rolland and Rue Suffren
activities.tip: Go before 9am for soft light and quieter yellow façades; verify any guided-walk price locally.

activities.name: Sri Aurobindo Ashram and Samadhi
activities.tip: Silence is expected; keep phones away and avoid peak queue periods around opening.

activities.name: Manakula Vinayagar Temple
activities.tip: Carry a light shawl and leave footwear at the stand.

activities.name: French Quarter café lunch and bakery stop
activities.tip: Excellent for vegetarian and vegan café food, but confirm no butter, cream or cheese in sauces and pastries; 2026 menu prices should be checked locally.

activities.name: Promenade / Rock Beach evening walk
activities.tip: The seafront is best at sunrise or after sunset; swimming is unsafe on the rocky stretch.

hotels.name: White Town guesthouse or heritage B&B

meals: Tamil vegetarian meals or Franco-Tamil dinner

days.note: This is a low-transfer day within central Puducherry. Use autos for the Botanical Garden/Tamil Quarter leg if the heat is high, and keep churches outside service times.

activities.name: Basilica of the Sacred Heart of Jesus
activities.tip: A Gothic-style church near the rail station; dress respectfully and avoid interrupting Mass.

activities.name: Puducherry Museum and Bharathi Park / Government Place exterior loop
activities.tip: Useful for French-period artefacts and Chola bronzes; museum fees could not be verified from a Jan-2026 source.

activities.name: Botanical Garden
activities.tip: Better for families and shade than as a must-see garden; confirm toy-train/entry operations on arrival.

activities.name: Mission Street and Nehru Street shopping
activities.tip: Look for incense, handmade paper, leather goods, cottons and Auroville products.

meals: Crêpes, quiche or vegan bowl in White Town

days.theme: Slow café, art and bookshop buffer
days.note: Use this optional day if you want Pondicherry as a slow base rather than a checklist. It is also a weather buffer for Northeast-monsoon showers or a late Chennai transfer.

activities.name: Leisurely café-and-bookshop morning in White Town
activities.tip: Café prices vary heavily by venue and were not Jan-2026 verified; check menus locally.

activities.name: Handmade paper / Auroville product shopping
Sunrise or blue-hour repeat at Promenade Beach

meals: Lemon rice or curd-free veg meals

Auroville.name: Auroville
Auroville.note: Auroville is close on the map but logistically separate: book Matrimandir access in advance, hire a scooter/taxi, and do not assume you can enter the inner chamber without prior confirmation.

days.theme: Matrimandir viewing, design stores & organic cafés
days.note: Treat Matrimandir as a booked spiritual visit, not a casual photo stop. Combine it with nearby Auroville visitor-zone cafés and maker stores rather than rushing back and forth to White Town.

activities.name: Auroville Visitor Centre orientation and boutiques
activities.tip: Pick up maps, check same-day guidance and browse Auroville-made paper, pottery, clothing and food products.

activities.name: Matrimandir viewing point or booked concentration visit
activities.tip: Viewing and inner-chamber access are controlled by Auroville; book ahead and re-confirm current visitor rules before travelling.

activities.name: Auroville organic/vegan café lunch
activities.tip: This is the UT's easiest vegan zone, but still ask about cheese, butter, curd and honey.

activities.name: Svaram / artisan workshop or design-store loop
activities.tip: Workshop access changes by day; confirm by phone or at the Visitor Centre.

days.note: Add this only if you have booked a specific workshop, yoga session or longer community visit; otherwise one focused day is enough for most travellers.

activities.name: Booked Auroville workshop, yoga or sound session
activities.tip: Do not assume walk-in availability; confirm timing and contribution directly with the organiser.

activities.name: Quiet cycle or scooter loop through Auroville lanes
activities.tip: Wear a helmet and avoid unlit lanes after dark.

activities.name: Auroville beach sunset if staying north of town

Chunnambar & Beach Belt.name: Chunnambar & Beach Belt
Chunnambar & Beach Belt.note: One day is enough for the boat-and-beach loop if the sea and backwater operations are running; add a second only for surfing lessons or a true beach break.

days.theme: Chunnambar backwater boat, Paradise Beach & Serenity sunset
days.note: This is the only day where backtracking is likely: do Chunnambar/Paradise Beach in the morning south of town, rest at lunch, then go north to Serenity only if energy and weather allow.

activities.name: Chunnambar Boat House backwater ride to Paradise Beach
activities.tip: Boat operations depend on weather, tides and crowding; recent official 2026 tariffs were not available, so confirm at the counter before committing.

activities.name: Paradise Beach swim-and-shade time
activities.tip: Swim only in marked safe zones and carry water, sunscreen and cash for beach facilities.

activities.name: Serenity Beach or Auroville Beach evening
activities.tip: Serenity is popular for surf schools; lesson prices change seasonally and should be checked directly.

activities.name: Beach café dinner
activities.tip: Seafood menus are common; vegetarians should ask for veg thali, pasta, pizza or South Indian staples.

hotels.name: Town guesthouse with day-trip beach access

meals: South Indian dinner back in town

days.theme: Optional surf lesson or lazy beach reset
days.note: Use this only in settled weather from roughly October to March; summer heat and Northeast-monsoon surf/rain make a long beach day less pleasant.

activities.name: Serenity Beach surf lesson or board rental
activities.tip: Book directly with a local surf school and verify sea conditions, instructor ratio and 2026 price before paying.

activities.name: Auroville Beach sunrise walk
Scooter/cycle café crawl between beach and White Town
activities.tip: Scooters are common but prices and police checks vary; carry a valid licence, helmet and original/accepted ID.

connections.method: Scooter, auto or taxi via ECR/Auroville Road
Taxi or scooter via Puducherry town; avoid doing this late at night

extras: Best overall weather is October to March, but October to December overlaps the Northeast monsoon: keep beach/boat plans flexible during rain spells.
April to June is hot and humid; plan heritage walks at sunrise/evening and use cafés or museums in the afternoon.
Matrimandir access is controlled and should be booked or re-confirmed ahead; casual visitors should expect only the viewing-point experience unless confirmed otherwise.
Karaikal, Mahe and Yanam are real Puducherry enclaves but are not efficient add-ons to a 3–4 day Pondicherry-town trip; pair Karaikal only if already driving deeper into Tamil Nadu's temple coast.
Hard 2026 transport/activity tariffs for boats, rentals, surf lessons and several museums were not consistently published; use the conservative bands here and verify at counters or direct operators.
